All 5 child tickets implemented + e2e-tested on branch feat/anton-dzh-autonomous-execution. Full pipeline proven: approved epic -> worktree -> PR -> in-review.
Runs list/detail API + SSE session-log stream (replay+tail) with tail lib and 6 tests
Run detail page: live xterm terminal (SSE), run meta grid, session timeline; attach logic extracted + unit-tested; verified via prod build + real HTTP/SSE
History/diagnostics: runs list grouped Active/History with timestamps+duration; run-detail timeline replays any past session log via SSE; failed runs surface error. Verified e2e.

All children complete: Runs API+SSE stream, run detail (live xterm terminal + meta grid + timeline), history & diagnostics. Active runs + history + live attach + diagnostics all delivered and verified e2e.

Layered execution prompt: locked base contract (src/prompts/system-base.md) + agent-tag + editable per-project seed (settingsJson.seedPrompt). Composed in system-prompt.ts, wired into execute-epic, settings API+UI (editable seed textarea + read-only base viewer). Verified e2e: composition unit tests, integration proof that base+seed+agent reach claude, settings round-trip, page render.
cron parser + scheduler loop + schedules service implemented; 15 tests pass

review-fix job: poll in-review PRs via gh, classify actionable (changes-requested/failing CI), re-materialize worktree, dispatch claude to fix, commit, push, comment + re-request review. e2e tested (3 cases inc. unpushed-prior-commit).
nightly-stringer job: stringer scan --delta → /scan-triage claude prompt → beads per project. e2e tested (triage-to-beads + zero-signal no-op).
orphan-grooming job: bucket open non-epic tickets with no parent under a reusable grooming epic. e2e tested (bucketing + idempotency).

All 4 child tickets implemented + e2e-tested on branch feat/anton-3t2-phase2-jobs: cron scheduler loop, review-fix, nightly-stringer, orphan-grooming. Handlers registered + scheduler started in service; default schedules seeded per project. Specialist-reviewed; 6 findings addressed. 164 tests pass, tsc + lint clean.

anton CLI (setup/doctor/dev/start) via bin/anton.mjs + package.json bin; setup runs prereq checks + drizzle migrate + node-pty rebuild (verified e2e); 3 smoke tests.
src/prompts/review-fix.md default + ProjectSettings.reviewFixPrompt override; job loads reasoning + appends PR context; settings API+UI expose it; e2e tested (default + override).
.github/workflows/release.yml on v* tag: bun install + lint + test + build + CLI-launch check, then softprops GitHub Release (npm publish left commented). YAML validated.

.github/workflows/ci.yml: lint+typecheck+test+build on push(main)+PR, with concurrency cancel. Gates verified green locally.
husky + lint-staged pre-commit: eslint --fix staged ts/tsx + tsc --noEmit; prepare script installs on bun install; verified it blocks a type error (exit 2).

CI + pre-commit + README all shipped on feat/anton-3t2-phase2-jobs; lint+typecheck+test(168)+build all green.

openPullRequest now reuses an existing open PR for the branch instead of erroring on gh pr create; covered by src/lib/git/ops.test.ts

Bounded app shell to viewport height (h-dvh) with main as the scroll region; board lanes now scroll independently while the topbar stays fixed. Falls back to natural scroll on stacked mobile layout.
TicketsView: header/filters/footer pinned (shrink-0), ticket rows scroll in an overflow-y-auto ul within the bounded main. Same pattern applied to epic detail.
Added reusable CopyButton (src/components/ui/copy-button.tsx); applied to epic id (board card + epic detail), ticket id (tickets table + ticket dialog), and epic/ticket/branch/worktree in run detail.

Run epic wired to POST /epics/[id]/approve (same trigger as board Approve) with loading/toast/refresh; when implementing shows a View run link to the active run. Open worktree copies the run worktree path (EpicDetail.run added via findOpenRunForEpic); disabled when no active worktree.
beads.delete wrapper + deleteTicket/deleteEpic libs + DELETE routes for ticket & epic; integration test passing
Unified always-editable ticket modal (no view/edit toggle); Save PATCHes diff, Reset reverts, ConfirmDeleteButton deletes; onDeleted wired into both callers
Epic detail: Force run button when implementing (re-triggers approve→execute-epic), delete-epic icon action navigates back to board

Backlog epic cards get an inline-confirm delete (ConfirmDeleteButton, iconOnly, stopPropagation over the overlay link); EpicBoard removes the epic optimistically via onEpicDeleted threaded through BoardColumn→DraggableEpicCard→EpicCard

src/lib/git/remote.ts (githubBaseUrl cached + pure webBaseFromRemote/prUrlFromRef/attachPrUrl); prUrl added to Ticket/Epic types and set in board/epic-detail/ticket-detail/tickets read layers; PrLink atom links chips in new tab (pointer-events-auto+stopPropagation for card overlays). Tests added.
All child tickets delivered: unified ticket modal, delete ticket/epic (detail + board backlog), force-run, clickable PR pills. typecheck+lint clean, 231 tests pass.
